rationale: In the citing paper, Pauwels, Hanssens, and Siddarth (2002) appears only once in a long grouped parenthetical citation about promotion/reference-price research. That passage uses the citation as general background evidence that prior work has studied promotion-related consequences, without assigning this specific paper a distinct conceptual or methodological role. The citing paper's hypotheses and firm-level empirical models of myopic management do not directly build on or test the cited paper.
